Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***************************************************************************

 Monoidal categories

 In this file, we define the notion of monoidal category. In addition, we
 prove the important laws for monoidal categories.

 The main definition in this file, takes a so-called displayed approach.
 More specifically, we define the notion of a monoidal structure on a
 category. For this notion, we define suitable accessors and we prove the
 laws. Finally, we also provide a bundled notion of monoidal category, which
 is a category together with a monoidal structure for it. The necessary
 accessors and laws are derived from the other notion.

 In this file, we use a whiskered approach. This means that we have two
 operations to tensor with morphisms: a left and a right whiskering. Both of
 these take an object and a morphism as input and they return a morphism as
 output.

 Contents
 1. Monoidal structures
 2. Opposite monoidal category
 3. Equivalences from the tensor and unit
 4. The unitors coincide
 5. Swapping the tensor
 6. More monoidal laws
 7. Bundled approach to monoidal categories

Note: after refactoring on March 10, 2023, the prior Git history of this development is found via
git log -- UniMath/CategoryTheory/Monoidal/MonoidalCategoriesWhiskered.v

 ***************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.FullyFaithful.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Local Open Scope cat.

Import BifunctorNotations.

(**
 1. Monoidal structures
 *)
Section A.

(** Data **)
Definition tensor_data (C : category) : UU :=
  bifunctor_data C C C.
Identity Coercion tensorintobifunctor : tensor_data >-> bifunctor_data.

Definition leftunitor_data
           {C : category}
           (T : tensor_data C)
           (I : C)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C), C⟦I ⊗_{T} x, x⟧.

Definition leftunitorinv_data
           {C : category}
           (T : tensor_data C)
           (I : C)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C), C⟦x, I ⊗_{T} x⟧.

Definition rightunitor_data
           {C : category}
           (T : tensor_data C)
           (I : C)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C), C⟦x ⊗_{T} I, x⟧.

Definition rightunitorinv_data
           {C : category}
           (T : tensor_data C)
           (I : C)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C), C⟦x, x ⊗_{T} I⟧.

Definition associator_data
           {C : category}
           (T : tensor_data C)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z : C), C ⟦(x ⊗_{T} y) ⊗_{T} z, x ⊗_{T} (y ⊗_{T} z)⟧.

Definition associatorinv_data
           {C : category}
           (T : tensor_data C)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z : C), C ⟦x ⊗_{T} (y ⊗_{T} z), (x ⊗_{T} y) ⊗_{T} z⟧.

Definition monoidal_data (C : category): UU :=
    ∑ (T : tensor_data C) (I : C),
    (leftunitor_data T I) × (leftunitorinv_data T I) ×
    (rightunitor_data T I) × (rightunitorinv_data T I) ×
    (associator_data T) × (associatorinv_data T).

Definition make_monoidal_data
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (lu : leftunitor_data T I)
           (luinv : leftunitorinv_data T I)
           (ru : rightunitor_data T I)
           (ruinv : rightunitorinv_data T I)
           (α : associator_data T)
           (αinv : associatorinv_data T)
  : monoidal_data C
  := (T,,I,,lu,,luinv,,ru,,ruinv,,α,,αinv).

Definition monoidal_tensor_data {C : category} (MD : monoidal_data C) : tensor_data C := pr1 MD.
Coercion monoidal_tensor_data : monoidal_data >-> tensor_data.

Definition monoidal_unit {C : category} (MD : monoidal_data C) : C := pr12 MD.
Notation "I_{ MD }" := (monoidal_unit MD).

Definition monoidal_leftunitordata
           {C : category}
           (MD : monoidal_data C)
  : leftunitor_data MD I_{MD}
  := pr1 (pr22 MD).
Notation "lu_{ MD }" := (monoidal_leftunitordata MD).

Definition monoidal_leftunitorinvdata
           {C : category}
           (MD : monoidal_data C)
  : leftunitorinv_data MD I_{MD}
  := pr12 (pr22 MD).
Notation "luinv_{ MD }" := (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata MD).

Definition monoidal_rightunitordata
           {C : category}
           (MD : monoidal_data C)
  : rightunitor_data MD I_{MD}
  := pr122 (pr22 MD).
Notation "ru_{ MD }" := (monoidal_rightunitordata MD).

Definition monoidal_rightunitorinvdata
           {C : category}
           (MD : monoidal_data C)
  : rightunitorinv_data MD I_{MD}
  := pr1 (pr222 (pr22 MD)).
Notation "ruinv_{ MD }" := (monoidal_rightunitorinvdata MD).

Definition monoidal_associatordata
           {C : category}
           (MD : monoidal_data C)
  : associator_data MD
  := pr12 (pr222 (pr22 MD)).
Notation "α_{ MD }" := (monoidal_associatordata MD).

Definition monoidal_associatorinvdata
           {C : category}
           (MD : monoidal_data C)
  : associatorinv_data MD
  := pr22 (pr222 (pr22 MD)).
Notation "αinv_{ MD }" := (monoidal_associatorinvdata MD).

(** Axioms **)
Definition leftunitor_nat
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (lu : leftunitor_data T I)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C), ∏ (f : C ⟦x,y⟧),  I ⊗^{ T}_{l} f · lu y = lu x · f.

Definition leftunitorinv_nat
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (luinv : leftunitorinv_data T I)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C), ∏ (f : C ⟦x,y⟧),  luinv x · I ⊗^{ T}_{l} f = f · luinv y.

Definition leftunitor_iso_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (lu : leftunitor_data T I)
           (luinv : leftunitorinv_data T I)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C), is_inverse_in_precat (lu x) (luinv x).

Definition leftunitor_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (lu : leftunitor_data T I)
           (luinv : leftunitorinv_data T I)
  : UU
  := leftunitor_nat lu × leftunitor_iso_law lu luinv.

Definition leftunitorlaw_nat
            {C : category}
            {T : tensor_data C}
            {I : C}
            {lu : leftunitor_data T I}
            {luinv : leftunitorinv_data T I}
            (lu_law : leftunitor_law lu luinv)
  : leftunitor_nat lu
  := pr1 lu_law.

Definition leftunitorlaw_iso_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           {lu : leftunitor_data T I}
           {luinv : leftunitorinv_data T I}
           (lu_law : leftunitor_law lu luinv)
  : leftunitor_iso_law lu luinv
  := pr2 lu_law.

Definition rightunitor_nat
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (ru : rightunitor_data T I)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C), ∏ (f : C ⟦x,y⟧),  f ⊗^{ T}_{r} I · ru y = ru x · f.

Definition rightunitorinv_nat
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (ruinv : rightunitorinv_data T I)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C), ∏ (f : C ⟦x,y⟧),  ruinv x · f ⊗^{ T}_{r} I = f · ruinv y.

Definition rightunitor_iso_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (ru : rightunitor_data T I)
           (ruinv : rightunitorinv_data T I)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C), is_inverse_in_precat (ru x) (ruinv x).

Definition rightunitor_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (ru : rightunitor_data T I)
           (ruinv : rightunitorinv_data T I)
  : UU
  := rightunitor_nat ru × rightunitor_iso_law ru ruinv.

Definition rightunitorlaw_nat
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           {ru : rightunitor_data T I}
           {ruinv : rightunitorinv_data T I}
           (rul : rightunitor_law ru ruinv)
  : rightunitor_nat ru
  := pr1 rul.

Definition rightunitorlaw_iso_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           {ru : rightunitor_data T I}
           {ruinv : rightunitorinv_data T I}
           (rul : rightunitor_law ru ruinv)
  : rightunitor_iso_law ru ruinv
  := pr2 rul.

Definition associator_nat_leftwhisker
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           (α : associator_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z z' : C) (h : C⟦z,z'⟧),
     (α x y z) · (x ⊗^{ T}_{l} (y ⊗^{ T}_{l} h))
     =
     ((x ⊗_{ T} y) ⊗^{ T}_{l} h) · (α x y z').

Definition associator_nat_rightwhisker
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           (α : associator_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x x' y z : C) (f : C⟦x,x'⟧),
     (α x y z) · (f ⊗^{ T}_{r} (y ⊗_{ T} z))
     =
     ((f ⊗^{ T}_{r} y) ⊗^{ T}_{r} z) · (α x' y z).

Definition associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           (α : associator_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y y' z : C) (g : C⟦y,y'⟧),
     (α x y z) · (x ⊗^{ T}_{l} (g ⊗^{ T}_{r} z))
     =
     ((x ⊗^{ T}_{l} g) ⊗^{ T}_{r} z) · (α x y' z).

Definition associator_iso_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           (α : associator_data T)
           (αinv : associatorinv_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z : C), is_inverse_in_precat (α x y z) (αinv x y z).

Definition associator_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           (α : associator_data T)
           (αinv : associatorinv_data T)
  : UU
  := (associator_nat_leftwhisker α) × (associator_nat_rightwhisker α) ×
     (associator_nat_leftrightwhisker α) × (associator_iso_law α αinv).

Definition associatorlaw_natleft
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {α : associator_data T}
           {αinv : associatorinv_data T}
           (αl : associator_law α αinv)
  : associator_nat_leftwhisker α
  := pr1 αl.

Definition associatorlaw_natright
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {α : associator_data T}
           {αinv : associatorinv_data T}
           (αl : associator_law α αinv)
  : associator_nat_rightwhisker α
  := pr1 (pr2 αl).

Definition associatorlaw_natleftright
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {α : associator_data T}
           {αinv : associatorinv_data T}
           (αl : associator_law α αinv)
  : associator_nat_leftrightwhisker α
  := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 αl)).

Definition associatorlaw_iso_law
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {α : associator_data T}
           {αinv : associatorinv_data T}
           (αl : associator_law α αinv)
  : associator_iso_law α αinv
  := pr2 (pr2 (pr2 αl)).

Definition triangle_identity
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (lu : leftunitor_data T I)
           (ru : rightunitor_data T I)
           (α : associator_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C), α x I y · x ⊗^{T}_{l} (lu y) = ru x ⊗^{T}_{r} y.

(** more triangle laws that are redundant in the axiomatisation *)
Definition triangle_identity'
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (lu : leftunitor_data T I)
           (α : associator_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C), α I x y · lu (x ⊗_{T} y) = lu x ⊗^{T}_{r} y.

Definition triangle_identity''
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           {I : C}
           (ru : rightunitor_data T I)
           (α : associator_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C), α x y I · x ⊗^{T}_{l} (ru y) = ru (x ⊗_{T} y).

Definition pentagon_identity
           {C : category}
           {T : tensor_data C}
           (α : associator_data T)
  : UU
  := ∏ (w x y z : C),
     ((α w x y) ⊗^{T}_{r} z) · (α w (x⊗_{T} y) z) · (w ⊗^{T}_{l} (α x y z))
     =
     (α (w⊗_{T}x) y z) · (α w x (y ⊗_{T} z)).

Definition monoidal_laws
           {C : category}
           (MD : monoidal_data C)
  : UU
  := is_bifunctor MD
     × (leftunitor_law lu_{MD} luinv_{MD})
     × (rightunitor_law ru_{MD} ruinv_{MD})
     × (associator_law α_{MD} αinv_{MD})
     × (triangle_identity lu_{MD} ru_{MD} α_{MD})
     × (pentagon_identity α_{MD}).

Definition monoidal (C : category) : UU :=
  ∑ (MD : monoidal_data C), (monoidal_laws MD).

Definition monoidal_mondata {C : category} (M : monoidal C) : monoidal_data C := pr1 M.
Coercion monoidal_mondata : monoidal >-> monoidal_data.

Definition monoidal_monlaws {C : category} (M : monoidal C) : monoidal_laws M := pr2 M.

Definition monoidal_tensor_is_bifunctor
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : is_bifunctor M
  := pr12 M.

Coercion monoidal_tensor
         {C : category}
         (M : monoidal C)
  : bifunctor C C C
  := _ ,, monoidal_tensor_is_bifunctor M.

Definition monoidal_leftunitorlaw
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : leftunitor_law lu_{M} luinv_{M}
  := pr12 (monoidal_monlaws M).

Definition monoidal_leftunitornat
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : leftunitor_nat lu_{M}
  := leftunitorlaw_nat (monoidal_leftunitorlaw M).

Definition monoidal_leftunitorisolaw
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : leftunitor_iso_law lu_{M} luinv_{M}
  := leftunitorlaw_iso_law (monoidal_leftunitorlaw M).


C: category
M: monoidal C
leftunitorinv_nat luinv_{ M}


C: category
M: monoidal C
leftunitorinv_nat luinv_{ M}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
luinv_{ M} x · I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} f = f · luinv_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} f =
(lu_{ M} x,,
 luinv_{ M} x,, monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x)
· (f · luinv_{ M} y)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} f = lu_{ M} x · (f · luinv_{ M} y)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} f = lu_{ M} x · f · luinv_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
lu_{ M} x · f =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} f
· (lu_{ M} y,,
   luinv_{ M} y,, monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y)

  apply pathsinv0, monoidal_leftunitornat.
Qed.

Definition monoidal_rightunitorlaw
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : rightunitor_law ru_{M} ruinv_{M}
  := pr122 (monoidal_monlaws M).

Definition monoidal_rightunitornat
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : rightunitor_nat ru_{M}
  := rightunitorlaw_nat (monoidal_rightunitorlaw M).

Definition monoidal_rightunitorisolaw
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : rightunitor_iso_law ru_{M} ruinv_{M}
  := rightunitorlaw_iso_law (monoidal_rightunitorlaw M).


C: category
M: monoidal C
rightunitorinv_nat ruinv_{ M}


C: category
M: monoidal C
rightunitorinv_nat ruinv_{ M}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ruinv_{ M} x · f ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M} = f · ruinv_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M} =
(ru_{ M} x,,
 ruinv_{ M} x,, monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x)
· (f · ruinv_{ M} y)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M} = ru_{ M} x · (f · ruinv_{ M} y)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M} = ru_{ M} x · f · ruinv_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ru_{ M} x · f =
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· (ru_{ M} y,,
   ruinv_{ M} y,, monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M y)

  apply pathsinv0, monoidal_rightunitornat.
Qed.

Definition monoidal_associatorlaw
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : associator_law α_{M} αinv_{M}
  := pr1 (pr222 (monoidal_monlaws M)).

Definition monoidal_associatornatleft
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : associator_nat_leftwhisker α_{M}
  := associatorlaw_natleft (monoidal_associatorlaw M).

Definition monoidal_associatornatright
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : associator_nat_rightwhisker α_{M}
  := associatorlaw_natright (monoidal_associatorlaw M).

Definition monoidal_associatornatleftright
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : associator_nat_leftrightwhisker α_{M}
  := associatorlaw_natleftright (monoidal_associatorlaw M).

Definition monoidal_associatorisolaw
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : associator_iso_law α_{M} αinv_{M}
  := associatorlaw_iso_law (monoidal_associatorlaw M).


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z · f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · α_{ M} x' y z
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (α_{ M} x' y z
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (α_{ M} x' y z
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
?b
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
?b =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (α_{ M} x' y z
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
?b

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x' y z
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) =
?f'

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x' y z
· (x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) = ?f'

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x' y z · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z)
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) = ?f'

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · α_{ M} x' y' z
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) = ?f'

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· ((x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · α_{ M} x' y' z
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'


  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· ((x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · α_{ M} x' y' z
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) = ?b
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
?b =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· ((x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · α_{ M} x' y' z
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) = ?b

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · α_{ M} x' y' z
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) = ?f'

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (α_{ M} x' y' z · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
?f'

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x' y' z · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) = ?f'

    apply (monoidal_associatornatleft M).
  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· ((x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
   · ((x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z')) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· ((x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z') =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z' =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z · f ⊗^{ M} (g ⊗^{ M} h) =
(f ⊗^{ M} g) ⊗^{ M} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z · f ⊗^{ M} (g ⊗^{ M} h) =
(f ⊗^{ M} g) ⊗^{ M} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z · f ⊗^{ M} (g ⊗^{ M} h) =
(f ⊗^{ M} g) ⊗^{ M} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  exact (associator_nat1 M f g h).
Qed.

Definition monoidal_triangleidentity
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : triangle_identity lu_{M} ru_{M} α_{M}
  := pr12 (pr222 (monoidal_monlaws M)).

Definition monoidal_pentagonidentity
           {C : category}
           (M : monoidal C)
  : pentagon_identity α_{M}
  := pr22 (pr222 (monoidal_monlaws M)).


C: category
M: monoidal_data C
isaprop (monoidal_laws M)


C: category
M: monoidal_data C
isaprop (monoidal_laws M)

  repeat (apply isapropdirprod)
  ; repeat (apply impred ; intro)
  ; repeat (try apply C)
  ; repeat (apply isaprop_is_inverse_in_precat).
Qed.

(** Some additional data and properties which one deduces from monoidal categories **)
(* Not the best name though, but here my creativity fails *)

C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
∏ (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
→ g · inv_from_z_iso p2 = inv_from_z_iso p1 · f


C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
∏ (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
→ g · inv_from_z_iso p2 = inv_from_z_iso p1 · f

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
g · inv_from_z_iso p2 = inv_from_z_iso p1 · f

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
inv_from_z_iso p1 · f = g · inv_from_z_iso p2

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
f = p1 · (g · inv_from_z_iso p2)

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
f = p1 · g · inv_from_z_iso p2

  
C: category
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
p1: z_iso x1 y1
p2: z_iso x2 y2
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
p: pr1 p1 · g = f · pr1 p2
p1 · g = f · p2

  apply p.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)


C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ⟹ functor_identity C
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ⟹ functor_identity C
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_trans_data (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_trans (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C) ?t

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_trans_data (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)
 exact (λ x, lu_{M} x).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_trans (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, lu_{ M} x)
 exact (λ x y f, monoidal_leftunitornat M x y f).
  
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
     (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, lu_{ M} x)
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      monoidal_leftunitornat M x y f))
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
     (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, lu_{ M} x)
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      monoidal_leftunitornat M x y f) x)
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (make_nat_trans (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
     (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, lu_{ M} x)
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      monoidal_leftunitornat M x y f) x)
  (luinv_{ M} x)

    apply (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x).
Defined.


C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)


C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ⟹ functor_identity C
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ⟹ functor_identity C
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_trans_data (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_trans (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C) ?t

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
nat_trans_data (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C)
 exact (λ x, ru_{M} x).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_trans (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, ru_{ M} x)
 exact (λ x y f, monoidal_rightunitornat M x y f).
  
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
     (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, ru_{ M} x)
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      monoidal_rightunitornat M x y f))
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
     (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, ru_{ M} x)
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      monoidal_rightunitornat M x y f) x)
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (make_nat_trans (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
     (functor_identity C) (λ x : C, ru_{ M} x)
     (λ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      monoidal_rightunitornat M x y f) x)
  (ruinv_{ M} x)

    apply (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x).
Defined.

Definition z_iso_from_associator_iso
           {C : category} (M : monoidal C) (x y z : C)
  : z_iso ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  := make_z_iso
       (α_{M} x y z)
       (αinv_{M} x y z)
       (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y z).


C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) · αinv_{ M} x y z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{l} h


C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ (x y z z' : C) (h : C ⟦ z, z' ⟧),
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) · αinv_{ M} x y z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{l} h

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z, z': C
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) · αinv_{ M} x y z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{l} h

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z, z': C
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)
· x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} h) =
(x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{l} h
· pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z')

  apply monoidal_associatornatleft.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z) · αinv_{ M} x' y z =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z


C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ (x x' y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z) · αinv_{ M} x' y z =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z) · αinv_{ M} x' y z =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)
· f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x' y z)

  apply monoidal_associatornatright.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) · αinv_{ M} x y' z =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z


C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ (x y y' z : C) (g : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧),
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) · αinv_{ M} x y' z =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, y', z: C
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) · αinv_{ M} x y' z =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, y', z: C
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)
· x ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) =
(x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y' z)

  apply monoidal_associatornatleftright.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)
· αinv_{ M} x' y' z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z
· ((f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
   · (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)
· αinv_{ M} x' y' z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z
· ((f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
   · (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h
· pr1 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x' y' z')

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
pr1
  (make_z_iso (α_{ M} x y z) (αinv_{ M} x y z)
     (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y z))
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h
· pr1
    (make_z_iso (α_{ M} x' y' z') (αinv_{ M} x' y' z')
       (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x' y' z'))

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
pr1
  (α_{ M} x y z,,
   make_is_z_isomorphism (α_{ M} x y z)
     (αinv_{ M} x y z)
     (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y z))
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h
· pr1
    (α_{ M} x' y' z',,
     make_is_z_isomorphism (α_{ M} x' y' z')
       (αinv_{ M} x' y' z')
       (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x' y' z'))

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
pr1
  (α_{ M} x y z,,
   αinv_{ M} x y z,, monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y z)
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h
· pr1
    (α_{ M} x' y' z',,
     αinv_{ M} x' y' z',,
     monoidal_associatorisolaw M x' y' z')

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
α_{ M} x y z
· (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)) =
(f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h · α_{ M} x' y' z'

  apply associator_nat1.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
f ⊗^{ M} (g ⊗^{ M} h) · αinv_{ M} x' y' z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (f ⊗^{ M} g) ⊗^{ M} h


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
f ⊗^{ M} (g ⊗^{ M} h) · αinv_{ M} x' y' z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (f ⊗^{ M} g) ⊗^{ M} h

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
f ⊗^{ M} (g ⊗^{ M} h) · αinv_{ M} x' y' z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z · (f ⊗^{ M} g) ⊗^{ M} h

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, z' ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} (g ⊗^{ M}_{r} z · y' ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)
· αinv_{ M} x' y' z' =
αinv_{ M} x y z
· ((f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · x' ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
   · (x' ⊗_{ M} y') ⊗^{ M}_{l} h)

  apply monoidal_associatorinv_nat1.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· z_iso_from_associator_iso M x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α_{ M} x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luiy:= make_z_iso (lu_{ M} y) (luinv_{ M} y) (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y) y
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α_{ M} x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luiy:= make_z_iso (lu_{ M} y) (luinv_{ M} y) (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y) y
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  luiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α_{ M} x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luiy:= make_z_iso (lu_{ M} y) (luinv_{ M} y) (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y) y
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  luiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruix:= make_z_iso (ru_{ M} x) (ruinv_{ M} x)
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) x
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α_{ M} x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luiy:= make_z_iso (lu_{ M} y) (luinv_{ M} y) (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y) y
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  luiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruix:= make_z_iso (ru_{ M} x) (ruinv_{ M} x)
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) x
ruixy:= functor_on_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M y)
  ruix: z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α_{ M} x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luiy:= make_z_iso (lu_{ M} y) (luinv_{ M} y) (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y) y
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  luiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruix:= make_z_iso (ru_{ M} x) (ruinv_{ M} x)
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) x
ruixy:= functor_on_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M y)
  ruix: z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luiy:= make_z_iso (lu_{ M} y) (luinv_{ M} y) (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y) y
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  luiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruix:= make_z_iso (ru_{ M} x) (ruinv_{ M} x)
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) x
ruixy:= functor_on_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M y)
  ruix: z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)
α_{ M} x I_{ M} y = ruixy · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luiy:= make_z_iso (lu_{ M} y) (luinv_{ M} y) (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y) y
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  luiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruix:= make_z_iso (ru_{ M} x) (ruinv_{ M} x)
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) x
ruixy:= functor_on_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M y)
  ruix: z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)
ruixy = α_{ M} x I_{ M} y · luixy

  exact (! (monoidal_triangleidentity M) x y).
Qed.

(* another proof of the same law - could be deleted in some future: *)

C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y


C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y) (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
auxiso1:= ?Goal: z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y) (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism (luinv_{ M} y)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat (luinv_{ M} y) (lu_{ M} y)

    split; apply monoidal_leftunitorisolaw. 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
auxiso1:= x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y,,
is_z_iso_leftwhiskering_z_iso M x
  (luinv_{ M} y)
  (lu_{ M} y,,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr2 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y),,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr1 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y)): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
auxiso1:= x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y,,
is_z_iso_leftwhiskering_z_iso M x
  (luinv_{ M} y)
  (lu_{ M} y,,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr2 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y),,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr1 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y)): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y) ((x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} y)
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
auxiso1:= x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y,,
is_z_iso_leftwhiskering_z_iso M x
  (luinv_{ M} y)
  (lu_{ M} y,,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr2 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y),,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr1 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y)): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
auxiso2:= ?Goal: z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  ((x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} y)
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

M: monoidal C
x, y: C

  (luinv_{ M} y)
  (lu_{ M} y,,

  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y) ((x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} y)

  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))

    split; apply monoidal_rightunitorisolaw. 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C

  (luinv_{ M} y)
  (lu_{ M} y,,

    X M y),,

x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y · αinv_{ M} x I_{ M} y =

  ((x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} y)
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· z_iso_from_associator_iso M x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
auxiso1:= x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y,,
is_z_iso_leftwhiskering_z_iso M x
  (luinv_{ M} y)
  (lu_{ M} y,,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr2 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y),,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr1 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y)): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
auxiso2:= ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y,,
is_z_iso_rightwhiskering_z_iso M y
  (ruinv_{ M} x)
  (ru_{ M} x,,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr2 (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M x),,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr1 (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M x)): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  ((x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} y)
inv_from_z_iso auxiso2 · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y =
z_iso_from_associator_iso M x I_{ M} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
auxiso1:= x ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv_{ M} y,,
is_z_iso_leftwhiskering_z_iso M x
  (luinv_{ M} y)
  (lu_{ M} y,,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr2 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y),,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr1 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M y)): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  (x ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} y))
auxiso2:= ruinv_{ M} x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y,,
is_z_iso_rightwhiskering_z_iso M y
  (ruinv_{ M} x)
  (ru_{ M} x,,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr2 (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M x),,
   (let X :=
      λ (M : monoidal C) 
      (x : C),
      pr1 (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M x) in
    X M x)): z_iso (x ⊗_{ M} y)
  ((x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} y)
inv_from_z_iso auxiso2 =
z_iso_from_associator_iso M x I_{ M} y
· inv_from_z_iso auxiso1

  apply pathsinv0, monoidal_triangleidentity.
Qed.


C: category
M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C
w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv_{ M} x y z
· αinv_{ M} w (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z =
αinv_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· αinv_{ M} (w ⊗_{ M} x) y z

M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C
w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv_{ M} x y z
· αinv_{ M} w (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z =
αinv_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· αinv_{ M} (w ⊗_{ M} x) y z

· αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z

· (w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv_{ M} x y z
   · αinv_{ M} w (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z)

M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C

make_z_iso (α_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (αinv_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (monoidal_associatorisolaw M w x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· (w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv_{ M} x y z
   · αinv_{ M} w (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z)

w, x, y, z: C
αinv_{ M} (w ⊗_{ M} x) y z =
(α_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z),,
 make_is_z_isomorphism (α_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   (αinv_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   (monoidal_associatorisolaw M w x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
· (w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv_{ M} x y z
   · αinv_{ M} w (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z)

 monoidal_associatorisolaw M w x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· (w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv_{ M} x y z

   · αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z)

M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C
αinv_{ M} (w ⊗_{ M} x) y z = ?b
C: category
M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C

(α_{ M} w x (y ⊗_{ M} z),,

 monoidal_associatorisolaw M w x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· (w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv_{ M} x y z
   · αinv_{ M} w (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · αinv_{ M} w x y ⊗^{ M}_{r} z)

C: category
M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C
α_{ M} w x y · αinv_{ M} w x y = ?t2

    apply (pr2 (pr2 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M w x y))).
  
C: category
M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C
identity ((w ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z =
identity (((w ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)

  apply (bifunctor_rightid M).
Qed.

End A.

Module MonoidalNotations.
  Notation "I_{ M }" := (monoidal_unit M) : cat.
  Notation "lu_{ M }" := (monoidal_leftunitordata M) : cat.
  Notation "luinv_{ M }" := (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata M) : cat.
  Notation "ru_{ M }" := (monoidal_rightunitordata M) : cat.
  Notation "ruinv_{ M }" := (monoidal_rightunitorinvdata M) : cat.
  Notation "α_{ M }" := (monoidal_associatordata M) : cat.
  Notation "αinv_{ M }" := (monoidal_associatorinvdata M) : cat.
  Notation "lu^{ M }_{ x }" := (monoidal_leftunitordata M x ) : cat.
  Notation "ru^{ M }_{ x }" := ( monoidal_rightunitordata M x ) : cat.
  Notation "α^{ M }_{ x , y , z }" := (monoidal_associatordata M x y z) : cat.
  Notation "luinv^{ M }_{ x }" := (monoidal_leftunitorinvdata M x ) : cat.
  Notation "ruinv^{ M }_{ x }" := ( monoidal_rightunitorinvdata M x ) : cat.
  Notation "αinv^{ M }_{ x , y , z }" := (monoidal_associatorinvdata M x y z) : cat.
End MonoidalNotations.

(**
 2. Opposite monoidal category
 *)
Section OppositeMonoidal.
  Context {C : category} (M : monoidal C).

  Import MonoidalNotations.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_data C^op C^op C^op

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_data C^op C^op C^op

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
(∏ a b1 b2 : C^op,
 C^op ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
 → C^op ⟦ (pr11 M) a b1, (pr11 M) a b2 ⟧)
× (∏ b a1 a2 : C^op,
   C^op ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
   → C^op ⟦ (pr11 M) a1 b, (pr11 M) a2 b ⟧)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ b a1 a2 : C^op,
C^op ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
→ C^op ⟦ (pr11 M) a1 b, (pr11 M) a2 b ⟧

    exact (λ x _ _ f, f ⊗^{M}_{r} x).
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_bifunctor monoidal_opp_tensor_data

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
is_bifunctor monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
a1, a2, b1, b2: C^op
f: C^op ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: C^op ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_tensor_data} g =
functoronmorphisms2 monoidal_opp_tensor_data f g

    exact (! bifunctor_equalwhiskers M a2 a1 b2 b1 f g).
  Qed.

  Definition monoidal_opp_tensor : bifunctor C^op C^op C^op
    := monoidal_opp_tensor_data ,, monoidal_opp_is_tensor.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
monoidal_data C^op

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
monoidal_data C^op

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∑ I : C^op,
leftunitor_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I
× leftunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I
  × rightunitor_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I
    × rightunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I
      × associator_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
        × associatorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
leftunitor_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
× leftunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
  × rightunitor_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
    × rightunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
        I_{ M}
      × associator_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
        × associatorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
leftunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
× rightunitor_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
  × rightunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
      I_{ M}
    × associator_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
      × associatorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
rightunitor_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
× rightunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
  × associator_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
    × associatorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
rightunitorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data I_{ M}
× associator_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
  × associatorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
associator_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data
× associatorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
associatorinv_data monoidal_opp_tensor_data

    exact α_{M}.
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
monoidal_laws monoidal_opp_data

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
monoidal_laws monoidal_opp_data

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_leftidax monoidal_opp_data
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_rightidax monoidal_opp_data
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_leftcompax monoidal_opp_data
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_rightcompax monoidal_opp_data
C: category
M: monoidal C
functoronmorphisms_are_equal monoidal_opp_data
C: category
M: monoidal C
leftunitor_nat lu_{ monoidal_opp_data}
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
lu^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· luinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} =
identity
  (I_{ monoidal_opp_data} ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} x)
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
luinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· lu^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} = identity x
C: category
M: monoidal C
rightunitor_nat ru_{ monoidal_opp_data}
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
ru^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· ruinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} =
identity
  (x ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} I_{ monoidal_opp_data})
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
ruinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· ru^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} = identity x
C: category
M: monoidal C
associator_nat_leftwhisker α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
C: category
M: monoidal C
associator_nat_rightwhisker α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
C: category
M: monoidal C
associator_nat_leftrightwhisker α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C^op
α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  ((x ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} y)
   ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} z)
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C^op
αinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z}
· α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  (x
   ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} (y ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} z))
C: category
M: monoidal C
triangle_identity lu_{ monoidal_opp_data}
  ru_{ monoidal_opp_data} α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
C: category
M: monoidal C
pentagon_identity α_{ monoidal_opp_data}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_leftidax monoidal_opp_data
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
a, b: C^op
a ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{l} identity b =
identity (a ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} b)

      apply (bifunctor_leftid M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_rightidax monoidal_opp_data
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
b, a: C^op
identity a ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{r} b =
identity (a ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} b)

      apply (bifunctor_rightid M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_leftcompax monoidal_opp_data
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
a, b1, b2, b3: C^op
g1: C^op ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
g2: C^op ⟦ b2, b3 ⟧
a ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{l} (g1 · g2) =
a ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{l} g1
· a ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{l} g2

      apply (bifunctor_leftcomp M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
bifunctor_rightcompax monoidal_opp_data
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
b, a1, a2, a3: C^op
f1: C^op ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
f2: C^op ⟦ a2, a3 ⟧
(f1 · f2) ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{r} b =
f1 ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{r} b
· f2 ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{r} b

      apply (bifunctor_rightcomp M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
functoronmorphisms_are_equal monoidal_opp_data
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
a1, a2, b1, b2: C^op
f: C^op ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
g: C^op ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data} g =
functoronmorphisms2 monoidal_opp_data f g

      exact (!(bifunctor_equalwhiskers M _ _ _ _ f g)).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
leftunitor_nat lu_{ monoidal_opp_data}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_leftunitorinvnat.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
lu^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· luinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} =
identity
  (I_{ monoidal_opp_data} ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} x)
 apply (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
luinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· lu^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} = identity x
 apply (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
rightunitor_nat ru_{ monoidal_opp_data}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_rightunitorinvnat.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
ru^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· ruinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} =
identity
  (x ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} I_{ monoidal_opp_data})
 apply (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C^op
ruinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x}
· ru^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x} = identity x
 apply (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
associator_nat_leftwhisker α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_associatorinvnatleft.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
associator_nat_rightwhisker α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_associatorinvnatright.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
associator_nat_leftrightwhisker α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_associatorinvnatleftright.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C^op
α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  ((x ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} y)
   ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} z)
 apply (monoidal_associatorisolaw M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C^op
αinv^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z}
· α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  (x
   ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} (y ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} z))
 apply (monoidal_associatorlaw M).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
triangle_identity lu_{ monoidal_opp_data}
  ru_{ monoidal_opp_data} α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_triangle_identity_inv.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
pentagon_identity α_{ monoidal_opp_data}
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C^op
α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ w, x, y}
⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{r} z
· α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ w,
  x ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} y, z}
· w
  ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{l} α^{ monoidal_opp_data
                             }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ w ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} x,
y, z}
· α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ w, x,
  y ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} z}

      
C: category
M: monoidal C
w, x, y, z: C^op
α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ w, x, y}
⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{r} z
· α^{ monoidal_opp_data }_{ w,
  x ⊗_{ monoidal_opp_data} y, z}
· w
  ⊗^{ monoidal_opp_data}_{l} α^{ monoidal_opp_data
                             }_{ x, y, z} =
w ⊗^{ M}_{l} αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ M }_{ w, x ⊗_{ M} y, z}
· αinv^{ M }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ M}_{r} z

      simpl ; apply assoc.
  Qed.

  Definition monoidal_opp : monoidal C^op
    := monoidal_opp_data ,, monoidal_opp_laws.
End OppositeMonoidal.

(**
 3. Equivalences from the tensor and unit
 *)
Section EquivalenceFromTensorWithUnit.
  Context {C : category} (M : monoidal C).

  Import MonoidalNotations.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
adjunction_data C C

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
adjunction_data C C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∑ G : C ⟶ C,
functor_identity C
⟹ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ∙ G
× G ∙ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
  ⟹ functor_identity C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
functor_identity C
⟹ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ∙ functor_identity C
× functor_identity C ∙ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
  ⟹ functor_identity C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
functor_identity C
⟹ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ∙ functor_identity C
C: category
M: monoidal C
(λ _ : functor_identity C
       ⟹ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
         ∙ functor_identity C,
 functor_identity C ∙ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
 ⟹ functor_identity C) ?pr1

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
functor_identity C
⟹ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ∙ functor_identity C
 apply (nat_z_iso_inv (leftunitor_nat_z_iso M)).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
(λ _ : functor_identity C
       ⟹ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
         ∙ functor_identity C,
 functor_identity C ∙ leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
 ⟹ functor_identity C)
  (let X :=
     pr1 (nat_z_iso_inv (leftunitor_nat_z_iso M)) in
   X)
 apply (leftunitor_nat_z_iso M).
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
equivalence_of_cats C C

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
equivalence_of_cats C C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
forms_equivalence
  ladjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ a : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit ladjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit a)
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ b : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit ladjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit b)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ a : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit ladjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit a)
 intro ; apply (nat_z_iso_inv (leftunitor_nat_z_iso M)).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ b : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit ladjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit b)
 intro ; apply (leftunitor_nat_z_iso M).
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
adjunction_data C C

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
adjunction_data C C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∑ G : C ⟶ C,
functor_identity C
⟹ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M} ∙ G
× G ∙ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
  ⟹ functor_identity C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
functor_identity C
⟹ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
  ∙ functor_identity C
× functor_identity C
  ∙ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
  ⟹ functor_identity C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
functor_identity C
⟹ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
  ∙ functor_identity C
C: category
M: monoidal C
(λ _ : functor_identity C
       ⟹ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
         ∙ functor_identity C,
 functor_identity C ∙ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
 ⟹ functor_identity C) ?pr1

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
functor_identity C
⟹ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
  ∙ functor_identity C
 apply (nat_z_iso_inv (rightunitor_nat_z_iso M)).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
(λ _ : functor_identity C
       ⟹ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
         ∙ functor_identity C,
 functor_identity C ∙ rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M}
 ⟹ functor_identity C)
  (let X :=
     pr1 (nat_z_iso_inv (rightunitor_nat_z_iso M)) in
   X)
 apply (rightunitor_nat_z_iso M).
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
equivalence_of_cats C C

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
equivalence_of_cats C C

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
forms_equivalence
  radjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ a : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit radjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit a)
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ b : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit radjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit b)

M: monoidal C
∏ a : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit radjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit a)
 intro ; apply (nat_z_iso_inv (rightunitor_nat_z_iso M)).
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
∏ b : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit radjunction_data_from_tensor_with_unit b)
 intro ; apply (rightunitor_nat_z_iso M).
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fully_faithful (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fully_faithful (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

    exact (adjointification lequivalence_from_tensor_with_unit).
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fully_faithful (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

M: monoidal C
fully_faithful (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

M: monoidal C
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

    exact (adjointification requivalence_from_tensor_with_unit).

C: category
M: monoidal C
faithful (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
faithful (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

    exact (pr2 (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful _ _ _ leftwhiskering_fullyfaithful)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
faithful (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
faithful (rightwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})

    exact (pr2 (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful _ _ _ rightwhiskering_fullyfaithful)).
  Defined.
End EquivalenceFromTensorWithUnit.

(**
 4. The unitors coincide
 *)
Section UnitorsCoincide.
  Context {C : category} (M : monoidal C).

  Import MonoidalNotations.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· (I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y =
(ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· (I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y =
(ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
(α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x}
 · I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y =
(ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x}
· I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x} =
ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x

    apply (monoidal_triangleidentity M I_{M} x).
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
· I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) =
(I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
· I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) =
(I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

    apply monoidal_associatornatleftright.
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) =
αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
· ((I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
   · α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y})

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) =
αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
· ((I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
   · α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y})

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
αiso:= make_z_iso α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
(monoidal_associatorisolaw M I_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) y): z_iso
  ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)) ⊗_{ M} y)
  (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) =
αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
· ((I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
   · α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y})

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
αiso:= make_z_iso α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
(monoidal_associatorisolaw M I_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) y): z_iso
  ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)) ⊗_{ M} y)
  (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
· ((I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
   · α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}) =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)

(I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x}) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y} =
αiso · I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)

· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

    apply lemma1.
  Qed.

· I_{ M}

· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y} =
αisor
· (αiso
   · I_{ M}
     ⊗^{ M}_{l} (α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
                 · lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}))

                 · lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y})) =
(ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
αiso:= make_z_iso α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
(monoidal_associatorisolaw M I_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) y): z_iso
  ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)) ⊗_{ M} y)
  (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
αiso':= make_z_iso α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x}
  αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x}
  (monoidal_associatorisolaw M I_{ M} I_{ M} x): z_iso ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} x)
  (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x))
αisor:= functor_on_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M y)
  αiso': z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} x))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)))
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· (α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
   · I_{ M}
     ⊗^{ M}_{l} (α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
                 · lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y})) =
(ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

?b =
(ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

M: monoidal C

  ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)) ⊗_{ M} y)

  αiso': z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} x))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)))
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x, y}
· I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
· I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} = ?b

M: monoidal C

· (α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x ⊗_{ M} y}
   · I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}) =

· ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} (x ⊗_{ M} y)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C

(monoidal_associatorisolaw M I_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) y): z_iso
  ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)) ⊗_{ M} y)
  (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))

  αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x}
  (monoidal_associatorisolaw M I_{ M} I_{ M} x): z_iso ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} x)
  (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x))

  αiso': z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     ((I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} x))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)))
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, x ⊗_{ M} y}
· I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} (x ⊗_{ M} y)

    apply monoidal_triangleidentity.
  Qed.

M: monoidal C
triangle_identity' lu_{ M} α_{ M}

x, y: C
precategory

C ⟶ ?D
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
faithful ?F
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
# ?F α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
· # ?F lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
# ?F (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
faithful ?F
 apply leftwhiskering_faithful. 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
# (leftwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
  α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
· # (leftwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
    lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
# (leftwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
  (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
# (leftwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
  (lu^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) =
# (leftwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
  α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
· # (leftwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
    lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
I_{ M}
⊗^{ M}_{l} (α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
            · lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}) =
# (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
  α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}
· # (leftwhiskering_functor M I_{ M})
    lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    apply (bifunctor_leftcomp (monoidal_tensor M)).
  Qed.

  Definition monoidal_triangleidentity' := right_whisker_with_lunitor.

M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y} =
luinv^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

M: monoidal C

luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y} =
luinv^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y

M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luinv^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y =
luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

M: monoidal C
x, y: C

· z_iso_from_associator_iso M I_{ M} x y

M: monoidal C

· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luix:= make_z_iso lu^{ M }_{ x} luinv^{ M }_{ x} (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) x
luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
luinv^{ M }_{ x} ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

  luix: z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)
luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =

· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)

  luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M (x ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
  (x ⊗_{ M} y)

· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y}

· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y} = luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luix:= make_z_iso lu^{ M }_{ x} luinv^{ M }_{ x} (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) x
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M y)
  luix: z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)
luipxy:= make_z_iso lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M (x ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
  (x ⊗_{ M} y)
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y} =
luixy · luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
luix:= make_z_iso lu^{ M }_{ x} luinv^{ M }_{ x} (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M x): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) x
luixy:= functor_on_z_iso (rightwhiskering_functor M y)
  luix: z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y
     (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x))
  (rightwhiskering_functor M y x)
luipxy:= make_z_iso lu^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  luinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M (x ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
  (x ⊗_{ M} y)
luixy = α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, x, y} · luipxy

    exact (! monoidal_triangleidentity' x y).
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}} =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

M: monoidal C
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}} =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

M: monoidal C
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} =
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}}

M: monoidal C

lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}} · lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} =

I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ?b

?b = lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}}

I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ?b

I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· identity (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) =
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}}

lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} =
identity (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M})

    apply monoidal_leftunitorisolaw.
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M} =
ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M} =
ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}}
· lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}} =
ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}}
· lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}} =
α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}}
· I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}} =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    apply lunitor_preserves_leftwhiskering_with_unit.
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
precategory
C: category
M: monoidal C
C ⟶ ?D
C: category
M: monoidal C
faithful ?F
C: category
M: monoidal C
# ?F lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = # ?F ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
faithful ?F
 apply rightwhiskering_faithful. 
C: category
M: monoidal C
# (rightwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
  lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} =
# (rightwhiskering_functor ?M I_{ ?M})
  ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    apply unitors_coincide_on_unit'.
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· (lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}},,
   luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}},,
   monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M I_{ M}) =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· (lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}},,
   luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}},,
   monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M I_{ M})

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ?b
C: category
M: monoidal C
?b = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
?b = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
?b = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

         apply pathsinv0, (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M I_{M}). 
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} · lu^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} =
identity I_{ M}

    apply (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw M I_{M}).
  Qed.
End UnitorsCoincide.

(* Using the lemma for a different category, hence outside of the section. *)

Section UnitorsCoincideAlternative.
  Import MonoidalNotations.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    exact (unitors_coincide_on_unit (monoidal_opp M)).
  Qed.
End UnitorsCoincideAlternative.

(**
 5. Swapping the tensor
 *)
Section MonoidalSwapped.
  Import MonoidalNotations.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
tensor_data V

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
tensor_data V

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
V → V → V
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∏ a b1 b2 : V,
V ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → V ⟦ ?pr1 a b1, ?pr1 a b2 ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
(λ _ : ∏ a b1 b2 : V,
       V ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧ → V ⟦ ?pr1 a b1, ?pr1 a b2 ⟧,
 ∏ b a1 a2 : V,
 V ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧ → V ⟦ ?pr1 a1 b, ?pr1 a2 b ⟧) 
  ?pr10

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
V → V → V
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
v, w: V
V

      exact (w ⊗_{Mon_V} v).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∏ a b1 b2 : V,
V ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
→ V ⟦ (λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) a b1,
  (λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) a b2 ⟧
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
v, w1, w2: V
f: V ⟦ w1, w2 ⟧
V ⟦ (λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) v w1,
(λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) v w2 ⟧

      exact (f ⊗^{Mon_V}_{r} v).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
(λ _ : ∏ a b1 b2 : V,
       V ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧
       → V ⟦ (λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) a b1,
         (λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) a b2 ⟧,
 ∏ b a1 a2 : V,
 V ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧
 → V ⟦ (λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) a1 b,
   (λ v w : V, w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v) a2 b ⟧)
  (λ (v w1 w2 : V) (f : V ⟦ w1, w2 ⟧),
   f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
v, w1, w2: V
f: V ⟦ w1, w2 ⟧
V ⟦ v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w1, v ⊗_{ Mon_V} w2 ⟧

      exact (v ⊗^{Mon_V}_{l} f).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
monoidal_data V

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
monoidal_data V

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
∑ I : V,
leftunitor_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I
× leftunitorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I
  × rightunitor_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I
    × rightunitorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I
      × associator_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)
        × associatorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)

leftunitor_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I_{ Mon_V}
× leftunitorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I_{ Mon_V}
  × rightunitor_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I_{ Mon_V}
    × rightunitorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)
        I_{ Mon_V}
      × associator_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)
        × associatorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)

× rightunitor_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V) I_{ Mon_V}

    × associator_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)

    I_{ Mon_V}
  × associator_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)
    × associatorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)
