× associatorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
associatorinv_data (tensor_swapped Mon_V)

    exact (λ v1 v2 v3, α_{Mon_V} v3 v2 v1).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
monoidal_laws (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
monoidal_laws (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_leftidax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_rightidax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_leftcompax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_rightcompax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
functoronmorphisms_are_equal
  (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
leftunitor_nat lu_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
lu^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· luinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} =
identity
  (I_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
luinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· lu^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} = 
identity x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
rightunitor_nat ru_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
ru^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· ruinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} =
identity
  (x
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} I_{ 
   monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V})
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
ruinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· ru^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} = 
identity x
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
associator_nat_leftwhisker
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
associator_nat_rightwhisker
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y, z: V
α^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  ((x ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} y)
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} z)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y, z: V
αinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z}
· α^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  (x
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} 
   (y ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} z))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
triangle_identity lu_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
  ru_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
pentagon_identity α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_leftidax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
 intro ; intro ; apply (bifunctor_rightid Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_rightidax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
 intro ; intro ; apply (bifunctor_leftid Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_leftcompax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
 intro ; intros ; apply (bifunctor_rightcomp Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
bifunctor_rightcompax (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
 intro ; intros ; apply (bifunctor_leftcomp Mon_V).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
functoronmorphisms_are_equal
  (monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V)
 intro ; intros ; apply (! bifunctor_equalwhiskers Mon_V _ _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
leftunitor_nat lu_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_rightunitornat.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
lu^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· luinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} =
identity
  (I_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} x)
 apply monoidal_rightunitorisolaw.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
luinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· lu^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} = identity x
 apply monoidal_rightunitorisolaw.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
rightunitor_nat ru_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_leftunitornat.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
ru^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· ruinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} =
identity
  (x
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} I_{ monoidal_swapped_data
                                          Mon_V})
 apply monoidal_leftunitorisolaw.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x: V
ruinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
· ru^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x} = identity x
 apply monoidal_leftunitorisolaw.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
associator_nat_leftwhisker
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
 intro ; intros ; apply (! monoidal_associatorinvnatright Mon_V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
associator_nat_rightwhisker
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
 intro ; intros ; apply (! monoidal_associatorinvnatleft Mon_V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
associator_nat_leftrightwhisker
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
 intro ; intros ; apply (! monoidal_associatorinvnatleftright Mon_V _ _ _ _ _).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y, z: V
α^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  ((x ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} y)
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} z)
 apply monoidal_associatorisolaw.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y, z: V
αinv^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z}
· α^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x, y, z} =
identity
  (x
   ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V} (y
                                     ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped_data
                                           Mon_V} z))
 apply monoidal_associatorisolaw.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
triangle_identity lu_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
  ru_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
  α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y: V
α^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x,
I_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}, y}
· x
  ⊗^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ monoidal_swapped_data
                                              Mon_V
                                       }_{ y} =
ru^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V }_{ x}
⊗^{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}_{r} y

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y: V
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ y, I_{ Mon_V}, x}
· ru^{ Mon_V }_{ y} ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} x =
y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ Mon_V }_{ x}

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y: V
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ y, I_{ Mon_V}, x}
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ y, I_{ Mon_V}, x}
   · y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ Mon_V }_{ x}) =
y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ Mon_V }_{ x}

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y: V
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ y, I_{ Mon_V}, x}
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ y, I_{ Mon_V}, x}
· y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ Mon_V }_{ x} =
y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ Mon_V }_{ x}

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
x, y: V
identity (y ⊗_{ Mon_V} (I_{ Mon_V} ⊗_{ Mon_V} x))
· y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ Mon_V }_{ x} =
y ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} lu^{ Mon_V }_{ x}

      apply id_left.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
pentagon_identity α_{ monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V}
 intro ; intros ; apply monoidal_pentagon_identity_inv.
  Qed.

  Definition monoidal_swapped {V : category} (Mon_V : monoidal V)
    : monoidal V
    := monoidal_swapped_data Mon_V ,, monoidal_swapped_laws Mon_V.
End MonoidalSwapped.

(**
 6. More monoidal laws
 *)
Section MonoidalLaws.
  Import MonoidalNotations.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
triangle_identity'' ru_{ M} α_{ M}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
triangle_identity'' ru_{ M} α_{ M}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y} =
ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: α^{ monoidal_swapped M }_{ I_{ monoidal_swapped M}, y, x}
· lu^{ monoidal_swapped M }_{ y ⊗_{ monoidal_swapped M} x} =
lu^{ monoidal_swapped M }_{ y} ⊗^{ monoidal_swapped M}_{r} x
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y} =
ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y} =
ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}
· (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}) =
ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}
· ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} = ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}
· ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} = ?b
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
?b = ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}
· ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} = ?b
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} =
?f'

      apply monoidal_associatorisolaw. 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
aux: αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ru^{ M }_{ y}
identity ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} I_{ M})
· ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} = ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y}
· αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y}
· αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y}
· αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
· z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y I_{ M}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruiy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ y} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) y
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruiy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ y} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) y
ruiyx:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  ruiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruiy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ y} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) y
ruiyx:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  ruiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruipxy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M (x ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} I_{ M})
  (x ⊗_{ M} y)
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruiy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ y} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) y
ruiyx:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  ruiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruipxy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M (x ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} I_{ M})
  (x ⊗_{ M} y)
ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y} · α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruiy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ y} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) y
ruiyx:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  ruiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruipxy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M (x ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} I_{ M})
  (x ⊗_{ M} y)
α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} =
ruipxy · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} ruinv^{ M }_{ y}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
ruiy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ y} ruinv^{ M }_{ y} (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M y): z_iso (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) y
ruiyx:= functor_on_z_iso (leftwhiskering_functor M x)
  ruiy: z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x
     (y ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}))
  (leftwhiskering_functor M x y)
ruipxy:= make_z_iso ru^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  ruinv^{ M }_{ x ⊗_{ M} y}
  (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw M (x ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} I_{ M})
  (x ⊗_{ M} y)
ruipxy = α^{ M }_{ x, y, I_{ M}} · ruiyx

    exact (! (left_whisker_with_runitor M) x y).
  Qed.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
t:= monoidal_triangle_identity_inv_alt M I_{ M} I_{ M}: I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}


    
C: category
M: monoidal C
t:= monoidal_triangle_identity_inv_alt M I_{ M} I_{ M}: I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· inv_from_z_iso
    (αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}},,
     α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}},, ?pr2)
C: category
M: monoidal C
t:= monoidal_triangle_identity_inv_alt M I_{ M} I_{ M}: I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
(λ g : C ⟦ (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} I_{ M},
       I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} g)
  α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
t:= monoidal_triangle_identity_inv_alt M I_{ M} I_{ M}: I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
· inv_from_z_iso
    (αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}},,
     α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}},, ?pr2)
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
t:= monoidal_triangle_identity_inv_alt M I_{ M} I_{ M}: I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}

      
C: category
M: monoidal C
t:= monoidal_triangle_identity_inv_alt M I_{ M} I_{ M}: I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} = ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}

      apply unitorsinv_coincide_on_unit_alt.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
t:= monoidal_triangle_identity_inv_alt M I_{ M} I_{ M}: I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{l} luinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}}
· αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} =
ruinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}} ⊗^{ M}_{r} I_{ M}
(λ g : C ⟦ (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⊗_{ M} I_{ M},
       I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   αinv^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}} g)
  α^{ M }_{ I_{ M}, I_{ M}, I_{ M}}
 split ; apply (monoidal_associatorisolaw M).
  Qed.
 End MonoidalLaws.

(**
 7. Bundled approach to monoidal categories
 *)
(** Accessors and notations for monoidal categories *)
Declare Scope moncat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Definition monoidal_cat : UU := ∑ (C : category), monoidal C.

Coercion monoidal_cat_to_cat (V : monoidal_cat) : category := pr1 V.
Coercion monoidal_cat_to_monoidal (V : monoidal_cat) : monoidal V := pr2 V.

Definition monoidal_cat_tensor_pt
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (x y : V)
  : V
  := x ⊗_{ pr2 V } y.

Notation "x ⊗ y" :=  (monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x y) : moncat.

Definition monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : V}
           (f : x₁ --> x₂)
           (g : y₁ --> y₂)
  : x₁ ⊗ y₁ --> x₂ ⊗ y₂
  := f ⊗^{ pr2 V } g.

Notation "f #⊗ g" := (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor f g) (at level 31) : moncat.


V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} f = identity x #⊗ f


V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} f = identity x #⊗ f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} f = identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V} f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} f =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y · x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y · x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f =
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y · x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = x ⊗^{ V}_{l} f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y · x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f = ?b

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y = ?y'

    apply (bifunctor_rightid V).
  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity (x ⊗_{ V} y) · x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f =
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} f

  apply id_left.
Qed.


V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} x = f #⊗ identity x


V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} x = f #⊗ identity x

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} x = f ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity x

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} x =
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x · z ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity x

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x · z ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity x =
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} x

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x · z ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity x = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = f ⊗^{ V}_{r} x

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x · z ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity x = ?b

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
z ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity x = ?t2

    apply (bifunctor_leftid V).
  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
f: V ⟦ y, z ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x · identity (z ⊗_{ V} x) =
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} x

  apply id_right.
Qed.

Section MonoidalCatAccessors.
  Context {V : monoidal_cat}.

  Import MonoidalNotations.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ identity y = identity (x ⊗ y)

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ identity y = identity (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
bifunctor_leftidax (pr2 V)
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
bifunctor_rightidax (pr2 V)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
bifunctor_leftidax (pr2 V)
 apply (bifunctor_leftid V).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
bifunctor_rightidax (pr2 V)
 apply (bifunctor_rightid V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ (g · g') = f #⊗ g · f' #⊗ g'

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ (g · g') = f #⊗ g · f' #⊗ g'

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
bifunctor_leftcompax (pr2 V)
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
bifunctor_rightcompax (pr2 V)
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
functoronmorphisms_are_equal (pr2 V)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
bifunctor_leftcompax (pr2 V)
 apply (bifunctor_leftcomp V).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
bifunctor_rightcompax (pr2 V)
 apply (bifunctor_rightcomp V).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
functoronmorphisms_are_equal (pr2 V)
 apply (bifunctor_equalwhiskers V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
identity x #⊗ (g · g') =
identity x #⊗ g · identity x #⊗ g'

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
identity x #⊗ (g · g') =
identity x #⊗ g · identity x #⊗ g'

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
identity x #⊗ (g · g') =
(identity x · identity x) #⊗ (g · g')

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
identity x #⊗ (g · g') = identity x #⊗ (g · g')

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ g'

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ g'

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = (identity x₁ · f) #⊗ (g · g')

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = f #⊗ (g · g')

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = f #⊗ g · identity x₂ #⊗ g'

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = f #⊗ g · identity x₂ #⊗ g'

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = (f · identity x₂) #⊗ (g · g')

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g': V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
f #⊗ (g · g') = f #⊗ (g · g')

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ identity y =
f #⊗ identity y · f' #⊗ identity y

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ identity y =
f #⊗ identity y · f' #⊗ identity y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ identity y =
(f · f') #⊗ (identity y · identity y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ identity y = (f · f') #⊗ identity y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = f #⊗ identity y₁ · f' #⊗ g

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = f #⊗ identity y₁ · f' #⊗ g

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = (f · f') #⊗ (identity y₁ · g)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = (f · f') #⊗ g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = f #⊗ g · f' #⊗ identity y₂

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = f #⊗ g · f' #⊗ identity y₂

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = (f · f') #⊗ (g · identity y₂)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f': V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(f · f') #⊗ g = (f · f') #⊗ g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ identity y₂

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ identity y₂

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = (identity x₁ · f) #⊗ (g · identity y₂)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = f #⊗ g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = f #⊗ identity y₁ · identity x₂ #⊗ g

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = f #⊗ identity y₁ · identity x₂ #⊗ g

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = (f · identity x₂) #⊗ (identity y₁ · g)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = f #⊗ g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ identity y₁ · identity x₂ #⊗ g =
identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ identity y₂

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ identity y₁ · identity x₂ #⊗ g =
identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ identity y₂

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = f #⊗ g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ identity y₂ =
f #⊗ identity y₁ · identity x₂ #⊗ g

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity x₁ #⊗ g · f #⊗ identity y₂ =
f #⊗ identity y₁ · identity x₂ #⊗ g

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
f #⊗ g = f #⊗ g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition mon_lunitor
             (x : V)
    : I_{V} ⊗ x --> x
    := monoidal_leftunitordata V x.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ f · mon_lunitor y =
mon_lunitor x · f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ f · mon_lunitor y =
mon_lunitor x · f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ f · mon_lunitor y =
I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f · lu^{ V }_{ y}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ f = I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V} f = I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x
· I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f = I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x
· I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ x) · I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ x)

    apply (bifunctor_rightid V).
  Qed.

  Definition mon_linvunitor
             (x : V)
    : x --> I_{V} ⊗ x
    := monoidal_leftunitorinvdata V x.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · mon_linvunitor y =
mon_linvunitor x · identity I_{ V} #⊗ f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · mon_linvunitor y =
mon_linvunitor x · identity I_{ V} #⊗ f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
luinv^{ V }_{ x} · I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f =
mon_linvunitor x · identity I_{ V} #⊗ f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f = identity I_{ V} #⊗ f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f = identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V} f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f =
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x
· I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (I_{ V} ⊗_{ V} x) · I_{ V} ⊗^{ V}_{l} f =
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x
· I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (I_{ V} ⊗_{ V} x) =
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity I_{ V} ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} x =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗_{ V} x)

    apply (bifunctor_rightid V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_lunitor x · mon_linvunitor x =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ x)

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_lunitor x · mon_linvunitor x =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ x)

    exact (pr1 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw V x)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_linvunitor x · mon_lunitor x = identity x

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_linvunitor x · mon_lunitor x = identity x

    exact (pr2 (monoidal_leftunitorisolaw V x)).
  Qed.

  Definition mon_runitor
             (x : V)
    : x ⊗ I_{V} --> x
    := monoidal_rightunitordata V x.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f #⊗ identity I_{ V} · mon_runitor y =
mon_runitor x · f

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f #⊗ identity I_{ V} · mon_runitor y =
mon_runitor x · f

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f #⊗ identity I_{ V} · mon_runitor y =
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V} · ru^{ V }_{ y}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f #⊗ identity I_{ V} = f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity I_{ V} = f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} I_{ V}
· y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity I_{ V} =
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} I_{ V}
· y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity I_{ V} =
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V} · identity (y ⊗ I_{ V})

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity I_{ V} =
identity (y ⊗ I_{ V})

    apply (bifunctor_leftid V).
  Qed.

  Definition mon_rinvunitor
             (x : V)
    : x --> x ⊗ I_{V}
    := monoidal_rightunitorinvdata V x.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · mon_rinvunitor y =
mon_rinvunitor x · f #⊗ identity I_{ V}

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · mon_rinvunitor y =
mon_rinvunitor x · f #⊗ identity I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
ruinv^{ V }_{ x} · f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V} =
mon_rinvunitor x · f #⊗ identity I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V} = f #⊗ identity I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V} = f ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V} =
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} I_{ V}
· y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
f ⊗^{ V}_{r} I_{ V} · identity (y ⊗_{ V} I_{ V}) =
f ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} I_{ V}
· y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (y ⊗_{ V} I_{ V}) =
y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity I_{ V}

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity I_{ V} =
identity (y ⊗_{ V} I_{ V})

    apply (bifunctor_leftid V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_runitor x · mon_rinvunitor x =
identity (x ⊗ I_{ V})

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_runitor x · mon_rinvunitor x =
identity (x ⊗ I_{ V})

    exact (pr1 (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw V x)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_rinvunitor x · mon_runitor x = identity x

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
mon_rinvunitor x · mon_runitor x = identity x

    exact (pr2 (monoidal_rightunitorisolaw V x)).
  Qed.

  Definition mon_lassociator
             (x y z : V)
    : (x ⊗ y) ⊗ z --> x ⊗ (y ⊗ z)
    := α_{ V } x y z.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
(f #⊗ g) #⊗ h · mon_lassociator x₂ y₂ z₂ =
mon_lassociator x₁ y₁ z₁ · f #⊗ (g #⊗ h)

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
(f #⊗ g) #⊗ h · mon_lassociator x₂ y₂ z₂ =
mon_lassociator x₁ y₁ z₁ · f #⊗ (g #⊗ h)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
mon_lassociator x₁ y₁ z₁ · f #⊗ (g #⊗ h) =
(f #⊗ g) #⊗ h · mon_lassociator x₂ y₂ z₂

    apply associator_nat2.
  Qed.

  Definition mon_rassociator
             (x y z : V)
    : x ⊗ (y ⊗ z) --> (x ⊗ y) ⊗ z
    := αinv_{ V } x y z.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
f #⊗ (g #⊗ h) · mon_rassociator x₂ y₂ z₂ =
mon_rassociator x₁ y₁ z₁ · (f #⊗ g) #⊗ h

  
V: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
f #⊗ (g #⊗ h) · mon_rassociator x₂ y₂ z₂ =
mon_rassociator x₁ y₁ z₁ · (f #⊗ g) #⊗ h

    exact (monoidal_associatorinv_nat2 V f g h).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator x y z · mon_rassociator x y z =
identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ z)

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator x y z · mon_rassociator x y z =
identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ z)

    exact (pr1 (monoidal_associatorisolaw V x y z)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
mon_rassociator x y z · mon_lassociator x y z =
identity (x ⊗ (y ⊗ z))

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: V
mon_rassociator x y z · mon_lassociator x y z =
identity (x ⊗ (y ⊗ z))

    exact (pr2 (monoidal_associatorisolaw V x y z)).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor x #⊗ identity y =
mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y
· identity x #⊗ mon_lunitor y

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor x #⊗ identity y =
mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y
· identity x #⊗ mon_lunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor x #⊗ identity y =
ru^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
α^{ V }_{ x, I_{ V}, y} · x ⊗^{ V}_{l} lu^{ V }_{ y} =
mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y
· identity x #⊗ mon_lunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor x #⊗ identity y =
ru^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y
 
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y =
ru^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y =
ru^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y =
ru^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y · identity (x ⊗_{ V} y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y = identity (x ⊗_{ V} y)

      apply (bifunctor_leftid V).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
α^{ V }_{ x, I_{ V}, y} · x ⊗^{ V}_{l} lu^{ V }_{ y} =
mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y
· identity x #⊗ mon_lunitor y
 
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} lu^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x #⊗ mon_lunitor y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} lu^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V} mon_lunitor y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} lu^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y)
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_lunitor y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗_{ V} (I_{ V} ⊗_{ V} y))
· x ⊗^{ V}_{l} lu^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y)
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_lunitor y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗_{ V} (I_{ V} ⊗_{ V} y)) =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y) =
identity (x ⊗_{ V} (I_{ V} ⊗_{ V} y))

      apply (bifunctor_rightid V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y =
mon_rinvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y =
mon_rinvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y =
identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y = ?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x #⊗ identity y = ?y'

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x #⊗ identity y =
ruinv^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y =
ruinv^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y
· (x ⊗ I_{ V}) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y =
ruinv^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rinvunitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y
· (x ⊗ I_{ V}) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y =
ruinv^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y
· identity ((x ⊗_{ V} I_{ V}) ⊗_{ V} y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
(x ⊗ I_{ V}) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y =
identity ((x ⊗_{ V} I_{ V}) ⊗_{ V} y)

      apply (bifunctor_leftid V).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· αinv^{ V }_{ x, I_{ V}, y}
· mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y =
identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, I_{ V}, y}
   · mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y) =
identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, I_{ V}, y}
   · mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· (αinv^{ V }_{ x, I_{ V}, y}
   · mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y) = ?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
αinv^{ V }_{ x, I_{ V}, y}
· mon_lassociator x I_{ V} y = ?t2

      apply mon_rassociator_lassociator.
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· identity (x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ y)) =
identity x #⊗ mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· identity (x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ y)) =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V} mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· identity (x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ y)) =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_linvunitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· identity (x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ y)) =
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_linvunitor y
· identity x ⊗^{ V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y)
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
functoronmorphisms_are_equal V

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} luinv^{ V }_{ y}
· identity (x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ y)) =
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_linvunitor y
· identity x ⊗^{ V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y)
 
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ y)) =
identity x ⊗^{ V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x ⊗^{ V}_{r} (I_{ V} ⊗ y) =
identity (x ⊗ (I_{ V} ⊗ y))

      apply (bifunctor_rightid V).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
functoronmorphisms_are_equal V
 apply (bifunctor_equalwhiskers V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y · mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) =
mon_lunitor x #⊗ identity y

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y · mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) =
mon_lunitor x #⊗ identity y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
lu^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y =
mon_lunitor x #⊗ identity y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
lu^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y =
mon_lunitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
lu^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y =
mon_lunitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
lu^{ V }_{ x} ⊗^{ V}_{r} y · identity (x ⊗_{ V} y) =
mon_lunitor x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} y
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗_{ V} y) = x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity y = identity (x ⊗_{ V} y)

    apply (bifunctor_leftid V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y = mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y = mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
· identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (x ⊗ y)) = mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
· identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (x ⊗ y)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
· identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (x ⊗ y)) = ?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (x ⊗ y)) = ?t2

      exact (!(mon_lunitor_linvunitor _)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
· (mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)) =
mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
   · (mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y))) =
mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
   · (mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y))) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
   · (mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y))) =
?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y
· (mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)) = 
?t2

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y · mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y)
· mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y) = ?t2

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_lassociator I_{ V} x y · mon_lunitor (x ⊗ y) = ?y'

      apply mon_lunitor_triangle.
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· (mon_lunitor x #⊗ identity y
   · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)) = mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lunitor x #⊗ identity y · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y) =
mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lunitor x #⊗ identity y · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y) =
identity (x ⊗ y) · mon_linvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_linvunitor x #⊗ identity y
· mon_lunitor x #⊗ identity y = identity (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
(mon_linvunitor x · mon_lunitor x) #⊗ identity y =
identity (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ identity y = identity (x ⊗ y)

    apply tensor_id_id.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) =
identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) =
identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) = ?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) = ?t2

      exact (!(left_whisker_with_runitor V x y)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
· (α^{ V }_{ x, y, I_{ V}}
   · x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y}) =
identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · α^{ V }_{ x, y, I_{ V}}
· x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · α^{ V }_{ x, y, I_{ V}}
· x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · α^{ V }_{ x, y, I_{ V}}
· x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} = ?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · α^{ V }_{ x, y, I_{ V}} =
?y'

      apply mon_rassociator_lassociator.
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗ (y ⊗ I_{ V}))
· x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V} mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (y ⊗ I_{ V})
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗ (y ⊗ I_{ V}))
· x ⊗^{ V}_{l} ru^{ V }_{ y} =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (y ⊗ I_{ V})
· x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_runitor y

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗ (y ⊗ I_{ V})) =
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (y ⊗ I_{ V})

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (y ⊗ I_{ V}) =
identity (x ⊗ (y ⊗ I_{ V}))

    apply (bifunctor_rightid V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} = mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

  
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} = mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
· identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ I_{ V}) = mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
· identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ I_{ V}) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
· identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ I_{ V}) = ?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ I_{ V}) = ?t2

      exact (!(mon_runitor_rinvunitor _)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
· (mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)) =
mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· (mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
   · (mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y))) =
mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· (mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
   · (mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y))) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
?b = mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· (mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
   · (mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y))) =
?b

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V}
· (mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)) = 
?t2

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · mon_runitor (x ⊗ y)
· mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y) = ?t2

      
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
mon_rassociator x y I_{ V} · mon_runitor (x ⊗ y) = ?y'

      apply mon_runitor_triangle.
    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· (identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y
   · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)) = mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y) =
mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y) =
identity (x ⊗ y) · mon_rinvunitor (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ mon_rinvunitor y
· identity x #⊗ mon_runitor y = identity (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ (mon_rinvunitor y · mon_runitor y) =
identity (x ⊗ y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: V
identity x #⊗ identity y = identity (x ⊗ y)

    apply tensor_id_id.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
mon_runitor I_{ V} = mon_lunitor I_{ V}

  
V: monoidal_cat
mon_runitor I_{ V} = mon_lunitor I_{ V}

mon_lunitor I_{ V} = mon_runitor I_{ V}

    apply unitors_coincide_on_unit.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
mon_lunitor I_{ V} = mon_runitor I_{ V}

mon_lunitor I_{ V} = mon_runitor I_{ V}

mon_lunitor I_{ V} = mon_lunitor I_{ V}

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} = mon_linvunitor I_{ V}

mon_linvunitor I_{ V} = mon_linvunitor I_{ V}

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator (w ⊗ x) y z
· mon_lassociator w x (y ⊗ z) =
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z

  
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator (w ⊗ x) y z
· mon_lassociator w x (y ⊗ z) =
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
α^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· α^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ x, y, z} =
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
α^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· α^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ x, y, z} =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· identity w ⊗^{ pr2 V} mon_lassociator x y z

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
α^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· α^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ x, y, z} =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z
· (w ⊗ (x ⊗ y)) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· (identity w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x ⊗ y ⊗ z)
   · w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_lassociator x y z)

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
α^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· α^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ x, y, z} =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z
· (w ⊗ (x ⊗ y)) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· (identity (w ⊗_{ V} (x ⊗ y ⊗ z))
   · w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_lassociator x y z)

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
α^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· α^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ x, y, z} =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z
· identity ((w ⊗ (x ⊗ y)) ⊗_{ V} z)
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· (identity (w ⊗_{ V} (x ⊗ y ⊗ z))
   · w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_lassociator x y z)

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
α^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· α^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} α^{ V }_{ x, y, z} =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_lassociator x y z

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator (w ⊗ x) y z
· mon_lassociator w x (y ⊗ z)
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

w, x, y, z: V

w, x, y, z: V

· mon_lassociator w x (y ⊗ z)
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z = ?b

w, x, y, z: V
?b =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
 
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator (w ⊗ x) y z
· mon_lassociator w x (y ⊗ z)
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z = ?b

w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator (w ⊗ x) y z
· mon_lassociator w x (y ⊗ z) = ?y'

        apply mon_lassociator_lassociator.
      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z
· w ⊗^{ V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

w, x, y, z: V

· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z
· identity w ⊗^{ V} mon_rassociator x y z =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· (mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
   · (identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z
      · identity w ⊗^{ V} mon_rassociator x y z)) =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· (mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
   · (identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z
      · identity w ⊗^{ V} mon_rassociator x y z)) =

w, x, y, z: V
?b =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
 
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· (mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
   · (identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z
      · identity w ⊗^{ V} mon_rassociator x y z)) = 
?b

        
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
identity w #⊗ mon_lassociator x y z
· identity w ⊗^{ V} mon_rassociator x y z = ?t2

        apply pathsinv0, tensor_comp_id_l.
      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· (mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
   · identity w
     #⊗ (mon_lassociator x y z · mon_rassociator x y z)) =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

   · identity w

· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

· (mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
   · identity w
     #⊗ (mon_lassociator x y z · mon_rassociator x y z)) =
?b

w, x, y, z: V
identity w
#⊗ (mon_lassociator x y z · mon_rassociator x y z) =
?t2

        
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator x y z · mon_rassociator x y z = ?t2

        apply mon_lassociator_rassociator.
      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· (mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
   · identity w #⊗ identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ z)) =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· (mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
   · identity (w ⊗ (x ⊗ y ⊗ z))) =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z
· mon_lassociator w (x ⊗ y) z

      
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_lassociator w x y #⊗ identity z =
mon_lassociator w x y ⊗^{ V}_{r} z

      apply (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering V).
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_rassociator w x (y ⊗ z)
· mon_rassociator (w ⊗ x) y z =
identity w #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· mon_rassociator w x y #⊗ identity z

  
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
mon_rassociator w x (y ⊗ z)
· mon_rassociator (w ⊗ x) y z =
identity w #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· mon_rassociator w x y #⊗ identity z

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
w ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z =
identity w #⊗ mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· mon_rassociator w x y #⊗ identity z

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
w ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z =
identity w ⊗^{ pr2 V} mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· mon_rassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V} identity z

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
w ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z =
identity w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} (x ⊗ (y ⊗ z))
· w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· (mon_rassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z
   · (w ⊗ x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity z)

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
w ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z =
identity (w ⊗_{ V} (x ⊗ (y ⊗ z)))
· w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· (mon_rassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z
   · (w ⊗ x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} identity z)

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
w ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z =
identity (w ⊗_{ V} (x ⊗ (y ⊗ z)))
· w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· (mon_rassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z
   · identity ((w ⊗ x ⊗ y) ⊗_{ V} z))

    
V: monoidal_cat
w, x, y, z: V
w ⊗^{ V}_{l} αinv^{ V }_{ x, y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x ⊗_{ V} y, z}
· αinv^{ V }_{ w, x, y} ⊗^{ V}_{r} z =
w ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{l} mon_rassociator x y z
· mon_rassociator w (x ⊗ y) z
· mon_rassociator w x y ⊗^{ pr2 V}_{r} z

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

mon_runitor x · mon_rinvunitor x =
identity (x ⊗ I_{ V})

x: V
mon_rinvunitor x · mon_runitor x = identity x

V: monoidal_cat
x, y₁, y₂, y₃: V
f: V ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
identity x #⊗ (f · g) =
identity x #⊗ f · identity x #⊗ g

      apply tensor_comp_id_l.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
V ⟶ V

  
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
V ⟶ V

    
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
functor_data V V
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
is_functor ?F

    
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
functor_data V V
 exact (monoidal_left_tensor_data x).
    
V: monoidal_cat
x: V
is_functor (monoidal_left_tensor_data x)
 exact (is_functor_monoidal_left_tensor x).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_data V V

  
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_data V V

    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
V → V
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
∏ a b : V, V ⟦ a, b ⟧ → V ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
V → V
 exact (λ x, x ⊗ y).
    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
∏ a b : V,
V ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ V ⟦ (λ x : V, x ⊗ y) a, (λ x : V, x ⊗ y) b ⟧
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ f, f #⊗ identity y).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
is_functor (monoidal_right_tensor_data y)

  
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
is_functor (monoidal_right_tensor_data y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_idax (monoidal_right_tensor_data y)
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_compax (monoidal_right_tensor_data y)

    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_idax (monoidal_right_tensor_data y)
 
V: monoidal_cat
y, x: V
identity x #⊗ identity y = identity (x ⊗ y)

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_compax (monoidal_right_tensor_data y)
 
V: monoidal_cat
y, x₁, x₂, x₃: V
f: V ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
(f · g) #⊗ identity y =
f #⊗ identity y · g #⊗ identity y

      apply tensor_comp_id_r.
  Qed.

  
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
V ⟶ V

  
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
V ⟶ V

    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_data V V
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
is_functor ?F

    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
functor_data V V
 exact (monoidal_right_tensor_data y).
    
V: monoidal_cat
y: V
is_functor (monoidal_right_tensor_data y)
 exact (is_functor_monoidal_right_tensor y).
  Defined.
End MonoidalCatAccessors.


V: monoidal_cat
functor_data (category_binproduct V V) V


V: monoidal_cat
functor_data (category_binproduct V V) V

  
V: monoidal_cat
category_binproduct V V → V
V: monoidal_cat
∏ a b : category_binproduct V V,
category_binproduct V V ⟦ a, b ⟧ → V ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

  
V: monoidal_cat
category_binproduct V V → V
 exact (λ x, pr1 x ⊗ pr2 x).
  
V: monoidal_cat
∏ a b : category_binproduct V V,
category_binproduct V V ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ V
  ⟦ (λ x : category_binproduct V V, pr1 x ⊗ pr2 x) a,
  (λ x : category_binproduct V V, pr1 x ⊗ pr2 x) b ⟧
 exact (λ x y f, pr1 f #⊗ pr2 f).
Defined.


V: monoidal_cat
is_functor (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V)


V: monoidal_cat
is_functor (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V)

  
V: monoidal_cat
functor_idax (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V)
V: monoidal_cat
functor_compax (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V)

  
V: monoidal_cat
functor_idax (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V)
 
V: monoidal_cat
x: category_binproduct V V
identity (pr1 x) #⊗ identity (pr2 x) =
identity (pr1 x ⊗ pr2 x)

    apply tensor_id_id.
  
V: monoidal_cat
functor_compax (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V)
 
V: monoidal_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct V V
f: category_binproduct V V ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct V V ⟦ y, z ⟧
(pr1 f · pr1 g) #⊗ (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
pr1 f #⊗ pr2 f · pr1 g #⊗ pr2 g

    apply tensor_comp_mor.
Qed.

category_binproduct V V ⟶ V

is_functor ?F

  
V: monoidal_cat
functor_data (category_binproduct V V) V
 exact (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V).
  
V: monoidal_cat
is_functor (monoidal_cat_tensor_data V)
 exact (is_functor_monoidal_cat_tensor V).
Defined.


C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
is_z_isomorphism (f #⊗ g)


C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
is_z_isomorphism (f #⊗ g)

  
C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
fiso:= f,, Hf : z_iso x₁ x₂: z_iso x₁ x₂
is_z_isomorphism (f #⊗ g)

  
C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
fiso:= f,, Hf : z_iso x₁ x₂: z_iso x₁ x₂
giso:= g,, Hg : z_iso y₁ y₂: z_iso y₁ y₂
is_z_isomorphism (f #⊗ g)

  
C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
fiso:= f,, Hf : z_iso x₁ x₂: z_iso x₁ x₂
giso:= g,, Hg : z_iso y₁ y₂: z_iso y₁ y₂
C ⟦ x₂ ⊗ y₂, x₁ ⊗ y₁ ⟧
C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
fiso:= f,, Hf : z_iso x₁ x₂: z_iso x₁ x₂
giso:= g,, Hg : z_iso y₁ y₂: z_iso y₁ y₂
is_inverse_in_precat (f #⊗ g) ?g

  
C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
fiso:= f,, Hf : z_iso x₁ x₂: z_iso x₁ x₂
giso:= g,, Hg : z_iso y₁ y₂: z_iso y₁ y₂
C ⟦ x₂ ⊗ y₂, x₁ ⊗ y₁ ⟧
 exact (inv_from_z_iso fiso #⊗ inv_from_z_iso giso).
  
C: monoidal_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
fiso:= f,, Hf : z_iso x₁ x₂: z_iso x₁ x₂
giso:= g,, Hg : z_iso y₁ y₂: z_iso y₁ y₂
is_inverse_in_precat (f #⊗ g)
  (inv_from_z_iso fiso #⊗ inv_from_z_iso giso)
 abstract
      (split ; rewrite <- tensor_comp_mor ; rewrite <- tensor_id_id ;
       [ rewrite <- (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso fiso), <- (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso giso)
       | rewrite <- (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv fiso), <- (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv giso) ] ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.
